name: Zaid FPS Bypass
description: Simple configurable FPS bypass for Geometry Dash on Android64.

issues.info: Include your device, screen refresh rate, Android, Geometry Dash and Geode versions, selected FPS and latest Geode log.

enabled.name: Enable FPS bypass
enabled.description: Overrides the animation interval used by Geometry Dash. Disable this to restore the interval requested by the game.

target-fps.name: Target FPS
target-fps.description: Requested frame rate. The visible result is still limited by the phone display, Android and device performance.
